steps.title: Identify the target meaning
steps.content: The fellowship is created to publicly [verb] exceptional artists, and the second sentence shows this is done “to celebrate their lifetime contributions.” The blank needs a verb that means to publicly honor or acknowledge someone's achievements.

steps.title: Match the correct word
steps.content: ”Recognize” directly expresses this meaning—it means to publicly acknowledge and honor someone's contributions. Startle contradicts the celebratory tone, familiarize suggests awareness rather than honor, and convey lacks the intended sense of celebration. That matches choice B — B is correct.
